mode_hint: Select a proxy mode. Current page will refresh after switching.
domain_check_mode_hint: Cannot detect in current mode, please switch to "Clash Proxy" mode
script_rules_need_init: Extension script file is not initialized or corrupted. Click "Init" button.
script_rules_not_found: Extension script file not found (current profile has no option.script)
rule_restart_hint: Rules modified, please restart Clash to apply
rule_source_js: From subscription extension script (.js in profiles dir)
script_rules_help_tip:
JS = From subscription extension script (.js in profiles dir, controlled by 'Write domains to subscription extension script' switch)
YA = From YAML config file

The 'Write domains to subscription extension script' switch only decides where to write. UI shows all deletable rules from both sources.
quick_add_help_tip:
Rule types:
DOMAIN: Exact match (e.g. example.com only matches example.com)
DOMAIN-SUFFIX: Match domain suffix (e.g. example.com matches example.com, www.example.com, api.example.com, etc.)
DOMAIN-KEYWORD: Match domains containing keyword (e.g. google matches www.google.com, googleapis.com, etc.)
settings_write_to_yaml_hint: Default: write to Script.js extension script. If checked, write to the current subscription's YAML config file (.yaml in profiles dir). Requires Clash restart.
settings_api_hint: Auto-generated from host+port. You can also edit the full URL manually.
settings_config_path_hint: Leave empty for auto-detect. Restart Clash after changing.
settings_zoom_hint: Adjust font and UI element size (80%-150%)
settings_tabs_hint: Add, delete, rename tabs and assign modules. Drag to reorder.
settings_tab_delete_last: At least one tab must be kept
settings_tab_empty: No modules. Move modules from other tabs.
settings_tab_order_hint: Drag to reorder tabs. Takes effect after saving.
settings_rule_display_hint: Display method when there are many rules
settings_rule_threshold_hint: Auto mode paginates when rules exceed this number; pagination mode shows this many per page
restart_clash_hint: Sync rules from profile file to Clash kernel and restart
restart_clash_failed: Restart failed, check if Clash is running
native_host_not_installed: Native Host not installed, run install.ps1
native_host_not_installed_hint: Native Host not installed. System proxy status, config file read/write, and auto-detect are unavailable. Run native-host\install.ps1 as Administrator to install
native_host_install_hint: When not installed, system proxy shows Null. Run the installer:
native_host_install_link_title: Right-click install.ps1 → Run with PowerShell (requires Administrator)
native_host_install_toast: Open the native-host directory and run install.ps1 as Administrator to install Native Host
error_clash_not_running: Clash is not running, cannot switch to Clash proxy mode
settings_clash_port_mismatch: Configured port unreachable, connected via default port {actual}, please check settings
settings_disable_fallback_hint: Only use configured port, do not try other ports
error_native_not_installed: Native Host not installed. Run native-host\install.ps1 as Administrator
settings_module_locked: Settings module is locked and cannot be moved
